metadata.description: LLM research full-lifecycle automation: literature survey → idea validation → experiment → paper draft (8 phases / 4 gates).

plugins.name: auto-research
plugins.description: End-to-end LLM/ML research workflow plugin. Python (uv + PyTorch + HuggingFace) stack with user-gated 8-phase automation. Covers evaluation, agent/tool-use, fine-tuning, prompt/ICL, and mechanistic interpretability (attention internals).
